description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular form. The facade features large windows and a modest entryway, flanked by small landscaped areas with trees and shrubs. The exterior walls are finished in a light, neutral color, giving the building a contemporary appearance. The rear and side elevations are simpler, with fewer windows and minimal ornamentation. The roof appears to have utility elements such as vents and possibly skylights. The overall design emphasizes simplicity, functionality, and integration with a suburban or urban neighborhood setting.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large front windows, and landscaped entry. The exterior is light-colored and minimalist, with clean lines and sparse ornamentation.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, large windows, and landscaped greenery.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the building's depth, side windows, and adjacent trees.
description_view_2: Rear view with minimal windows and visible utility features on the roof.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the side wall, roof details, and landscaping.
